item.title: Pumpkin Sheet Cake with Brown Butter Frosting
item.description: This Mini Pumpkin Sheet Cake with Brown Butter Frosting is the perfect cake for fall. This pumpkin cake is fluffy, perfectly spiced and smothered with a brown butter frosting. It’s delicious and quick to throw together and ideal for a small get together.

media:content.media:title: Pumpkin Sheet Cake with Brown Butter Frosting
media:content.media:description: This Mini Pumpkin Sheet Cake with Brown Butter Frosting is the perfect cake for fall. This pumpkin cake is fluffy, perfectly spiced and smothered with a brown butter frosting. It’s delicious and quick to throw together and ideal for a small get together.

item.title: The Only Thing Better Than a Caesar Salad and Pizza
item.description: The only thing better than a caesar salad and pizza is caesar salad on pizza. The crunch is very satisfying. recipe:

media:content.media:title: The Only Thing Better Than a Caesar Salad and Pizza
media:content.media:description: The only thing better than a caesar salad and pizza is caesar salad on pizza. The crunch is very satisfying. recipe:

item.title: The Coziest Cheesy Garlic Bread Pull
item.description: Save this for your next slow morning when you want something warm and impossible to resist.

media:content.media:title: The Coziest Cheesy Garlic Bread Pull
media:content.media:description: Save this for your next slow morning when you want something warm and impossible to resist.

item.title: Brazilian Coconut Cake - Bolo de Coco
item.description: This Bolo de Coco is a soft coconut cake layered with a creamy coconut filling and soaked with milk for the most moist cake you’ve ever tasted. It’s simple to make ahead and tastes even better after chilling.

media:content.media:title: Brazilian Coconut Cake - Bolo de Coco
media:content.media:description: This Bolo de Coco is a soft coconut cake layered with a creamy coconut filling and soaked with milk for the most moist cake you’ve ever tasted. It’s simple to make ahead and tastes even better after chilling.

item.title: This Apple Cobbler Is Pure Fall Magic
item.description: Save this one for the kind of Sunday that needs something warm from the oven.

media:content.media:title: This Apple Cobbler Is Pure Fall Magic
media:content.media:description: Save this one for the kind of Sunday that needs something warm from the oven.

item.title: Delicious Apple Cider Donuts with Maple Sea Salt Glaze
item.description: apple cider donuts dunked in a maple sea salt glaze. So good

media:content.media:title: Delicious Apple Cider Donuts with Maple Sea Salt Glaze
media:content.media:description: apple cider donuts dunked in a maple sea salt glaze. So good

item.title: Quick and Delicious Miso Honey Lemon Salmon Recipe
item.description: This Miso Lemon Salmon is quick, easy, and comes together in under 20 minutes. It’s the perfect weeknight meal that doubles as meal prep for the week. It’s bright, it’s both sweet and savory, and tastes so good with rice or on top of my endive salad.

media:content.media:title: Quick and Delicious Miso Honey Lemon Salmon Recipe
media:content.media:description: This Miso Lemon Salmon is quick, easy, and comes together in under 20 minutes. It’s the perfect weeknight meal that doubles as meal prep for the week. It’s bright, it’s both sweet and savory, and tastes so good with rice or on top of my endive salad.

item.title: This Cobbler Vanishes Every Time
item.description: That pancake-like topping is the part people can’t stop talking about.

media:content.media:title: This Cobbler Vanishes Every Time
media:content.media:description: That pancake-like topping is the part people can’t stop talking about.

item.title: Miso in Cookies? Trust Me
item.description: These Miso Peanut Butter Cookies are delicious chewy, nutty and sweet. While the miso paste isn’t detectable, it adds a delicious savoriness that is craveable. You can’t eat just one.

media:content.media:title: Miso in Cookies? Trust Me
media:content.media:description: These Miso Peanut Butter Cookies are delicious chewy, nutty and sweet. While the miso paste isn’t detectable, it adds a delicious savoriness that is craveable. You can’t eat just one.

item.description: The secret ingredient for the best grilled cheese

media:content.media:title: The secret ingredient for the best grilled cheese

item.title: Why Conchas Hit So Hard Every Time
item.description: Soft, golden, and made for a weekend treat you’ll keep coming back to.

media:content.media:title: Why Conchas Hit So Hard Every Time
media:content.media:description: Soft, golden, and made for a weekend treat you’ll keep coming back to.

item.title: strawberry cake with little strawberries on top.
item.description: Is there anything cuter than pink cake? I think not. This Mini Strawberry Cake is the perfect small batch cake. It has a deliciously fluffy texture and tastes exactly like a fresh, sweet strawberry.

media:content.media:title: strawberry cake with little strawberries on top.
media:content.media:description: Is there anything cuter than pink cake? I think not. This Mini Strawberry Cake is the perfect small batch cake. It has a deliciously fluffy texture and tastes exactly like a fresh, sweet strawberry.

item.title: Easy Apple Cobbler
item.description: Save it for the next time you want dessert that feels nostalgic without the work.

media:content.media:title: Easy Apple Cobbler
media:content.media:description: Save it for the next time you want dessert that feels nostalgic without the work.

item.title: Delicious Cheesy Jalapeño Cornbread
item.description: This Jalapeño Cheddar Cornbread has crispy edges, a super moist crumb, is very cheesy and spicy

media:content.media:title: Delicious Cheesy Jalapeño Cornbread
media:content.media:description: This Jalapeño Cheddar Cornbread has crispy edges, a super moist crumb, is very cheesy and spicy

item.title: Olympic Village Chocolate Muffins I Can’t Stop Thinking About
item.description: Norweign swimmer, Henrik Christensen, has made everyone crave these triple chocolate muffins from the Olympic village dining hall. I now think of them as the official Olympic Chocolate Muffins. They’re tall bakery-style chocolate muffins that have a bit of ganache in the center, a large crumb and square chocolate chunks. Delicious!

media:content.media:title: Olympic Village Chocolate Muffins I Can’t Stop Thinking About
media:content.media:description: Norweign swimmer, Henrik Christensen, has made everyone crave these triple chocolate muffins from the Olympic village dining hall. I now think of them as the official Olympic Chocolate Muffins. They’re tall bakery-style chocolate muffins that have a bit of ganache in the center, a large crumb and square chocolate chunks. Delicious!

item.title: The Sweet & Savory Sandwich of Summer
item.description: prosciutto peach and burrata sandwich. a little salty, a little sweet and creamy with a bunch of crisp from the grilled bread and peppery arugula. this one is delicious!

media:content.media:title: The Sweet & Savory Sandwich of Summer
media:content.media:description: prosciutto peach and burrata sandwich. a little salty, a little sweet and creamy with a bunch of crisp from the grilled bread and peppery arugula. this one is delicious!

item.title: I Can’t Stop Staring at This Apple Pie
item.description: This Rose Apple Pie is a labor of love. It’s an apple pie that is in shape of a rose. It’s stunning to look at and even better to eat. And topped with a bourbon caramel glaze and flakey sea salt. Slice it up and enjoy your life.

media:content.media:title: I Can’t Stop Staring at This Apple Pie
media:content.media:description: This Rose Apple Pie is a labor of love. It’s an apple pie that is in shape of a rose. It’s stunning to look at and even better to eat. And topped with a bourbon caramel glaze and flakey sea salt. Slice it up and enjoy your life.

item.title: Your New Favorite: Frozen Strawberry Margaritas
item.description: Strawberry Margaritas are my favorite fruity take on a classic margarita. Forget your bottled mixes because the best type of margarita is one made from fresh strawberries, fresh lime juice and the most delicious tequila blanco.

media:content.media:title: Your New Favorite: Frozen Strawberry Margaritas
media:content.media:description: Strawberry Margaritas are my favorite fruity take on a classic margarita. Forget your bottled mixes because the best type of margarita is one made from fresh strawberries, fresh lime juice and the most delicious tequila blanco.

item.title: If I Ran a Bakery, I’d Serve This
item.description: Tart, fluffy, and the kind of slice that disappears fast.

media:content.media:title: If I Ran a Bakery, I’d Serve This
media:content.media:description: Tart, fluffy, and the kind of slice that disappears fast.

item.title: The Coziest Soup + Grilled Cheese Combo
item.description: A warm, easy dinner that tastes like exactly what you wanted tonight.

media:content.media:title: The Coziest Soup + Grilled Cheese Combo
media:content.media:description: A warm, easy dinner that tastes like exactly what you wanted tonight.
